repository_summary.project_name: Academix v13.2 — Logistics Public Sector Refactor
repository_summary.description: Refactor of a hybrid Python/VBA Mini-ERP into a pure VBA-only Decision Support System (DSS) for stock management, compliant with Algerian CNEPD BTS standards.
repository_summary.status: ALL PHASES COMPLETE: thesis realigned (6→4 chapters), Python/Flask/JSON removed, external API replaced, terminology cleaned, constants synced, DSS narrative established, VBA design spec created.

golden_rules.rule: Zero External Dependencies — NO Python, NO Flask, NO JSON files, NO APIs, NO internet calls. Pure VBA only. Everything runs locally inside Excel via VBA Processing Units.
Thesis hierarchy strictly: فصل (Chapter) → مبحث (Section) → مطلب (Requirement) → أولاً، ثانياً... The word فرع (Branch) is STRICTLY BANNED.
Language: Formal Academic Arabic (RTL). Tone strictly administrative — emphasize "Zero Cost", "Standard Microsoft Tools", "Accountability".
Citations: Strict CNEPD footnotes (تهميش) at bottom of each page.

DSS Framing: System is a "Decision Support System" (نظام دعم قرار), NOT an automated replacement. The tool supports the physical flow but generates reports for financial validation, preserving administrative hierarchy.

Ladder Logic: Must first prove "Professional Competence" (Manual Math/Science) before showing "BTS Level" (Automation). Never say "The system calculates"; say "The system verifies the manual calculation" or "The system proposes a value for validation".

mapping.to: نظام دعم قرار مبني على Excel
نظام دعم القرار لتسيير المخزون (Decision Support System)

step.name: Demande d'Achat
step.desc: Internal need expression before any purchase

step.name: التحقق من المخزون
step.desc: Verify current stock levels and ROP status

step.name: Bon de Commande
step.desc: Purchase order issued to supplier after DA approval

step.name: Bon de Réception
step.desc: Goods receipt confirmation on delivery from supplier

step.name: Bon de Sortie
step.desc: Material issue to requesting service with DA reference

chapter.title: الإطار النظري والمفاهيمي
chapter.desc: Stock management theory, CMUP, ABC/XYZ classification, Wilson EOQ model, ROP, Safety Stock

chapter.title: التشخيص والميدان
chapter.desc: Geographic/institutional framework, field diagnosis, phantom stock problems, supply interruptions, data analysis

chapter.title: التصميم والمنهجية
chapter.desc: Pure VBA DSS design, sheet architecture, UserForms, security guards, alert engine, report generation

chapter.title: النتائج والتقييم
chapter.desc: Before/after comparison, Toner G030 case study, KPIs, recommendations, future improvements

dir.name: Thesis_Surgical_Edit
dir.desc: Thesis writing and editing — the ONLY folder for thesis operations

file.name: THESIS_CHAPTER_OUTLINE.md
file.desc: 4-chapter structure plan aligned with CNEPD BTS

dir.name: Software_Surgical_Edit
dir.desc: Code refactoring workspace — pure VBA only

file.name: ERP_Academie_v13_Master.html
file.desc: HTML dump of workbook for UI/sheet analysis (206 flx classes, 25 sheets)

file.name: VBA_DESIGN_SPEC.md
file.desc: Comprehensive VBA design spec (25 sheets, 20 modules, 2 UserForms, guard chain)

dir.name: Repomix_Outputs
dir.desc: AI context packing — load when switching modes

file.name: repomix-thesis.xml
file.desc: Thesis context lock — full thesis content

file.name: repomix-software.xml
file.desc: VBA software context lock — all module contents

dir.name: Academic_References
dir.desc: Course PDFs (Sem 1-4), old drafts, reference data, Excel backups

dir.name: 03_Documents_Generes_Exemples
dir.desc: Generated document examples (BR, BS, DA PDFs)

module.name: MAIN_MACROS.bas
module.desc: Entry points — AjouterMouvement() shows frmStockEntry

module.name: mod_Config.bas
module.desc: Centralized constants — sheet names, passwords, version, logistics params

module.name: mod_StockEngine.bas
module.desc: Core stock calcs — GetStockLevel(), UpdateStock(), CheckNegative(), GetSafetyStock(), ComputeROP(), GetAnnualDemandFromHistory()

module.name: mod_StockEntry_Logic.bas
module.desc: Stock entry form logic — ValidateEntry(), AddGridRow(), ComputeTotal(), 8 guard chain

module.name: mod_Dashboard.bas
module.desc: Dashboard rendering — RefreshDashboard(), UpdateKPIs(), UpdateCriticalTable(), UpdateABCXYZSummary()

module.name: mod_Analysis.bas
module.desc: ABC-XYZ analysis — UpdateABC_Classification(), calls mod_SyncBridge.SyncMetricsFromLedger()

module.name: mod_Procurement.bas
module.desc: Procurement docs — GenerateOrderReport(), GenerateDA(), GenerateBC(), supplier evaluation

module.name: mod_ReceiptTag.bas
module.desc: Receipt tag generation — GenerateReceiptTagPDF(), GenerateLocalVerifyCode() (offline, no API)

module.name: mod_Reports.bas
module.desc: Report aggregation — GenerateStockReport(), GenerateMovementReport()

module.name: mod_ExportEngine_v13_2.bas
module.desc: PDF export engine — ExportTransactionToPDF(), PopulateTemplateBon(), ExportToExcel(), ExportDashboardPDF()

module.name: mod_AuditTrail.bas
module.desc: Audit logging — LogTransaction(), ClearAuditLogs() — append-only to AUDIT_LOG sheet

module.name: mod_Localization.bas
module.desc: FR/AR bilingual strings — GetLocalizedString(), UnicodeMsgBox() via MessageBoxW API

module.name: mod_Navigation.bas
module.desc: Sheet navigation — OpenStockForm()

module.name: mod_UI_Setup.bas
module.desc: UI initialization — SetupAllSheets(), ApplyFormatting()

module.name: mod_Utilities.bas
module.desc: General utilities — IsValidDate(), FormatCurrency(), CreateFolder()

module.name: mod_SheetSetup.bas
module.desc: Sheet creation/protection — SetupProtectedSheet(), ApplyDataValidation()

module.name: mod_Database.bas
module.desc: Secure write layer — SecureWriteTransaction() to MOUVEMENTS sheet

module.name: mod_Backup.bas
module.desc: Workbook backup — BackupProjectCode() exports all VBA components

module.name: mod_Restore.bas
module.desc: Backup restore — RestoreFromBackup(), VerifyBackup()

module.name: mod_LogViewer.bas
module.desc: Log viewing — GetLastLogEntries()

module.name: mod_SyncBridge.bas
module.desc: Internal sheet sync — SyncMetricsFromLedger(), CommitStaging() (replaces Python bridge)

form.name: frmStockEntry
form.desc: Stock movement entry — txtDate, cmbArticle, cmbTypeDoc, txtQuantite, txtPrixUnitaire, lstGrid, btnEnregistrer, chkAuditTrail

form.name: frmSystemLog
form.desc: System log viewer — lstLogEntries, cmbFilter, btnRefresh

sheet.name: FOURNISSEURS
sheet.desc: Supplier catalog — F-001 to F-003 with weighted evaluation

sheet.name: MOUVEMENTS
sheet.desc: Core transaction ledger — all stock IN/OUT entries

sheet.name: CALCULS_EOQ
sheet.desc: EOQ calculations — Wilson formula, D=1546, Q*=176

sheet.name: STAGING_BUFFER
sheet.desc: Local staging for batch ops (replaces staging_buffer.json)

sheet.name: RECEIPT_TAG
sheet.desc: Receipt tag with local verification code

sheet.name: TEMPLATE_BON
sheet.desc: Generic form template for PDF export

item.name: Terminology mapping
item.desc: Database → السجل الرقمي, Backend → وحدات المعالجة VBA

tool.name: OpenCode (opencode)
tool.desc: CLI with 29 agents, 78 skills, OMC v4.9.3 orchestration, cloud models (glm-5.1, kimi-k2.5, qwen3.5)

tool.name: Claude Code
tool.desc: Via opencode with OMC layer — 78 skills including refactoring, technical-writing, code-review, testing, security-audit

tool.name: Ollama
tool.desc: Local models: gemma:2b, gemma3:4b, llama3.3:70b, qwen2.5-coder:7b, qwen3-coder:30b — skipped for this session

tool.name: Claude Desktop
tool.desc: Will receive project CLAUDE.md + repomix XML context files for integration
